video_title: Octonaughty and the Fractionator - Full Episode | Series 8 E25 | Numberblocks

segments.text: The face of the town hall clock has split in half.
Three's prize pumpkin has been divided into thirds.
Four sandwiches been cut into four equal pieces.
There's only one block naughty enough to cause this, Miss Ship.
But however will I get inside without a secret code?
Oh yes, I've got a fractionator!
Spitting in half to equal parts.
Who needs a door when one museum becomes two half museums?
Finally, the power of every number in the universe will be mine!
Spitting in half to equal parts.
No one can stop me now!
Why do you always try to ruin my fun?
Spitting in half to equal parts.
Two split into two equal parts.
Oh, split into two equal parts.
Six split into two equal parts.
Two, four, six looks like your numbers up, Octo flop.
Now let's see how do you turn this thing off?
Splitting into that. Three equal parts.
Which means fourths for equal parts.
Oh, split into four equal parts.
Now let's put this back where it belongs.
You might think you've won Octo block,
but all you've really done is split one big problem
We're four quarters or fourths of...
And now I know what happens when eight is split into quarters.
Actually, we're not feeling terrible at all.
That should keep you out of trouble for a while.
After I've tidied up the mess you've made,
and with this to help, I'll be able to do it
in a fraction of the time.
